notes.title: Underwriting Notes
notes.text:
Matched inforce rates of .305 core and .186 buy-up based on experience. See exp rating sheet attached.

FM

notes.title: New Issue per V.1; PDF policy & certs
V #2 added pre-ex to class 1 benefits eff 8/1/14
notes.text: Class one was missing the PRe-Ex exclusion as in clas 2. Added.

notes.title: Re-Issue per V.2; PDF policy & cert
notes.text:
From: 	Dean Thuss
To:	Stromoski, Jamie
Date: 	9/24/2014 3:58 PM
Subject: 	Grace Hospital; STD 163606
Attachments:  Grace Hospital STD 163606 policy.pdf; 
	       Grace Hospital STD 163606 C1Fcert.pdf
Jamie,

Attached are Policy and Class 1 flat Cert PDFs for Grace Hospital, STD 163606; re-issued (effective 08/01/2014) to add a 3/12 Pre-Ex Limitation on a person's increase in coverage if elected during an approved enrollment period (matching Class 2).

No change to the Class 2 Cert.

Regards,

Dean N. Thuss, FLMI
Senior Contract Analyst
Reliance Standard Life Insurance Co.

(800) 351-7500 x-3597
(267) 256-3597
Dean.Thuss@rsli.com

notes.title: V#3 Increase CL 1 Benefit Eff 8/1/15
notes.text: PEr attached approval, increase CL 1 Benefit max from 750 to 1000.

notes.title: Amend per V.3; PDF polcy & cert
notes.text:
From: 	Dean Thuss
To:	Stromoski, Jamie
Date: 	8/4/2015 10:48 AM
Subject: 	Grace Hospital; STD 163606
Attachments:  Grace Hospital STD 163606 policy.pdf; 
	       Grace Hospital STD 163606 Fcert.pdf
Jamie,

Attached are Policy and C1 flat Cert PDFs for Grace Hospital; STD 163606; amended through 08/01/2015 to increase the Class 1 maximum weekly Core benefit from $750 to $1,000.

No Change to the Class 2 Cert.

Regards,

Dean N. Thuss, FLMI
Senior Contract Analyst
Reliance Standard Life Insurance Co.

(800) 351-7500 x-3597
(267) 256-3597
Dean.Thuss@rsli.com

notes.title: Ver#11:  BOR eff 3/1/2018
notes.text: Changed BOR per attached external doc

notes.title: 8/1/2018 Renewal - bumped
notes.text: Bump - Lives > 8, BTM > 70%, Recent Census, LR < 100%

notes.title: v 14; BOR and Sales Rep Change
AUGUST, 2019 NO CENSUS RENEWAL
notes.text: No census received as of 4/26/19.

notes.text: Rate extended for 12 months due to COVID 19 for 2020 Renewal Year.

notes.title: v 17; Change Renewal to 1/1/2022
notes.text: UW Approval attached

notes.title: JANUARY, 2022 NO CENSUS RENEWAL
notes.text: No census received as of 9/24/21.

notes.title: VER #22 -  Eff Date 04/01/23  Ticket# 02207688
notes.text: update the sales rep to Scott Niederberger
